changes.reason: Activate the dormant 1DTE pullback companion path as a router split while leaving the profitable breakout_long_1dte thresholds unchanged. Prior direct 1DTE tightening hurt score and net profit, so the cleaner test is attribution/cannibalization rather than more quality gating.
Keep the companion profile explicitly enabled so the one-dte router activation can produce a measurable split if the existing playbook trigger is reachable.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should test whether VALID_1DTE_ONLY pullback/reclaim conditions can add or re-route 1DTE trades without damaging the existing breakout_long_1dte edge. Main risk is cannibalizing the current 20-trade, $1227.3 breakout fallback sleeve or producing no trades; reject unless combined 1DTE PnL is flat or better, total net profit retains at least 98% of run_044, and PnL/exposure stays flat or improves.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: Use a config-only companion-profile router split rather than direct 1DTE tightening. breakout_long_1dte is profitable but middling efficiency, and the experiment memory shows local 1DTE quality gates lost $558.5 and worsened score. Adding pullback_long_1dte to the one-dte router is a distinct mechanism: it measures whether the existing dormant pullback trigger separates reclaim-style 1DTE trades while preserving the breakout profile unchanged.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY breakout_long_1dte contributed 20 trades, $1227.3 PnL, no slow >=12h trades, but only $157.9 PnL/exposure hour and -375.7 worst MAE. Prior direct tightening damaged score and net profit, which argues for a companion split rather than stricter breakout thresholds.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Split
strategy_hypotheses.risk: The companion may be unreachable, or it may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades without improving combined 1DTE PnL, MAE, or exposure efficiency.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than breakout continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= current $1227.3, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL/trades explicitly measured, combined 1DTE worst/average MAE improves or stays flat, total net profit >=98% of run_044, and total score flat or better.
